Yet the relevant benchmark landscape largely divides into symbolic causal reasoning benchmarks without realistic data analysis or data analysis benchmarks without a principled causal data-generating structure. articles.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) is becoming increasingly important for post-training large language models (LLMs). Previous RL pipelines for LLMs were mostly synchronous and batch-interleaved, which is inefficient for long-horizon agentic tasks. Recently, asynchronous RL has emerged as a more efficient alternative by updating the model as rollouts arrive. However, existing asynchronous RL systems ofte
articles.summary: 提出单回滚异步优化方法，用于智能体强化学习后训练。针对长周期任务中同步RL效率低下的问题，该方法在每次回滚到达时立即更新模型，减少等待开销，同时避免数据过时和训练不稳定，提升了训练效率。

articles.title: UP: Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization for Breaking the Exploration-Stability Dilemma
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become the standard paradigm for enhancing the complex reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs).
